name: Honey and Orange Tea Loaf (Scottish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to 350°F or Mark 4.
2. Grease and line a 2 lb loaf tin.
3. Cream the margarine and honey in a bowl until smooth.
4. Add the egg and beat vigorously.
5. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking powder.
6. Alternately add the milk to the creamed mixture with the sifted ingredients.
7. Sprinkle in the orange rind and mix well.
8. Spoon the batter into the prepared tin.
9. Bake for 45 minutes.
10. Remove from the oven and glaze with honey.
11. Return to the oven for a further 10 minutes.
12. Remove from the tin and cool on a wire rack.
13. Serve sliced and buttered.
